creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Ruslan Makhmatkhanov from comment #0)
I suspect this is the same error with https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2021-February/093200.html and the -CURRENT package builder has not caught up yet. Do you think you can try to build base system and port yourself?
